game:characterdesc-rustweaver:
The world has been corrupted long before you were here by people like you. You feel the strands of reality, of time, ebbing and flowing in unnatural ways, ripe for manipulation by your hand. It is power incarnate, a tool that could be used for the greater good or greater evil. The world looks upon you as an anomaly to blame for its instability yet only you and people like you can correct it...if you choose to.
You are a Rustweaver. Manipulate the Rust how you wish though remember, there is always a cost.
itemdesc-rustweaverstome: A spellbook, used for the manipulation of the Rust.
game:rustweave-tome-reject: You do not understand the tome.
game:rustweave-no-spell-in-slot: No spell is prepared in slot {0}.
game:rustweave-loreweave-note: Loreweave spells are cosmetic and do not cost corruption.
game:rustweave-displacement-braced-attac: The target is braced against displacement.
game:rustweave-displacement-braced-targe: Your Warping Brace catches the hostile displacement.
game:rustweave-stable-sense-result: The next Temporal Storm will arrive in {0} in-game hours. Intensity: {1}.
game:rustweave-stable-sense-active: A Temporal Storm is already forming. Intensity: {0}.
game:rustweave-stable-sense-unavailable: The Rust is quiet. No readable Temporal Storm timing is available.
game:rustweave-foundational-fabric-activ: Foundational Fabric is already woven around you.
game:rustweave-foundational-fabric-debt-: Foundational Fabric defers {0} Temporal Corruption. Accumulated debt: {1}.
Foundational Fabric unravels. {0} deferred Temporal Corruption returns.
game:rustweave-foundational-fabric-expir: Foundational Fabric unravels without returning any debt.
game:rustweave-still-thread-fail: The Rust cannot find your temporal thread.
game:rustweave-still-thread-active: Still Thread holds your temporal stability in place.
game:rustweave-spell-unlearned: That spell is no longer learned.
game:rustweave-mentor-disabled: Rustplane Sage mentors are disabled in the current config.
game:rustweave-mentor-no-spells: No teachable spells are currently available.
game:rustweave-mentor-started: The Rustplane Sage begins your study of {0}.
game:rustweave-mentor-invalid: The Sage cannot teach that working.
game:rustweave-mentor-complete: Your study is complete. You learned {0}.
game:rustweave-prepared-slot-full: Choose an empty prepared slot or select a slot to replace.
game:rustweave-spell-target-fail: The spell has no valid target.
game:rustweave-discovery-reject: Only a Rustweaver can study this.
game:rustweave-no-new-spell-from-this: No new spell could be learned from this.
game:rustweave-discovery-fragments: You already understand this working. Its fragments may still be useful.
game:rustweave-spell-capacity-fail: The Rust refuses to take any more.
itemdesc-rusttablet: A venting tablet that stores corruption drawn from a Rustweaver and slowly decays over time.
itemdesc-forgotten-book: A decayed book full of unstable Rustweaver marginalia.
itemdesc-arcane-notes: Loose notes describing fragments of a Rustweave working.
itemdesc-rustplane-prism: A refractive shard that shows impossible threads of the Rustplane.
itemdesc-ancient-codex: An old codex containing structured but dangerous Rustweaver notation.
itemdesc-scroll-from-the-rust: A brittle scroll carrying a spell-pattern drawn from the Rust.
game:rustweave-rusttablet-reject: Only a Rustweaver can vent into the tablet.
game:rustweave-rusttablet-overloaded: The Rust surges too violently to vent.
game:spelldesc-dummy-rustcall: A harmless placeholder spell used for scaffold testing.
